Environment: env_so101_vla_isaaclab
Machine: DGX Spark / GB10 workstation
Purpose: Isaac Lab + VLA Foundry inference integration

Known working:
- Isaac Lab launcher can use this Conda Python.
- VLA Foundry RoboticsProcessor loads.
- VLA Foundry model loads.
- generate_actions() works inside Isaac Lab-launched Python.
- Live Isaac Lab evaluator runs camera-enabled SO101 env.

Important caution:
- VLA Foundry training/preprocessing still uses /home/insol02/IH_ws/vla_foundry uv environment.
- Do not casually upgrade numpy, torch, torchvision, transformers, or draccus in this Conda env.

Python: /home/insol02/miniconda3/envs/env_so101_vla_isaaclab/bin/python
numpy: 1.26.0
torch: 2.9.0+cu130
torchvision: 0.24.0
transformers: 4.57.6
draccus: 0.8.0
webdataset: 0.2.111
timm: 1.0.15
open_clip: 2.32.0
